title: Route, Path, Principle, Technique, and Donor Class Normalization Doctrine

source_local_posture: Source-local boundaries are durable records; donor packages are evidence, not authority; promotion requires review, owner-file resolution, lexicon approval, and corpus-scale fit.
risk_controls: Feature Ledger is not freeform class table
Technique is not every named action
Principle is not early reality overwrite
Faction rank is not Faction Route
Donor package is evidence not authority
Record shapes are doctrine handoff structures not final schemas
